textByHashes.dfc29d4a456ce6bb389cae84a94d13367cef80c5: Do you want to use the balloon? Just so you know, some locations require special logs and high Firemaking skills.
textByHashes.0fc7337b24f0fa575626e0bab5158d0471665195: Weapons are not allowed on Entrana. I must search you first.
textByHashes.c3937b4931fac49a5f909d62c76c0d41168b2dfe: I'm sorry, no weapons or armour may be worn to Entrana. Come back when you have laid them down.
textByHashes.20311de0dead1af69e1b161ec43af09c326807f7: I am Assistant Marrow. I'm working here part time while I study to be a doctor.
textByHashes.e0977bf72a80f520a94641dac6da7121384a570d: Do you want to use the balloon?
